emails.subject: ISDA Forms
emails.body: Kay Can I get these documents from you to forward to Peoples or are there other concerns? Thanks, Gregg Forwarded by Gregg Penman/Corp/Enron on 09/22/2000 03:07 PM Stephanie Panus 09/22/2000 02:57 PM

emails.subject: Re: ISDA Forms
emails.body: Re: ISDA Forms Hi Gregg, I was out of the office on Friday, so I just now heard your voice mail. I haven't been through all my email, but I haven't seen anything from Stephanie on email. I do have a hard copy version which is too long to fax with confidence. I'll give the forms a look, and fax them your way with some type of disclaimer for Peoples benefit. Kay From: Gregg Penman 09/22/2000 03:09 PM
